Migration Guide: elasticsearch → opensearch-project/opensearch

License Shift Alert

elasticsearch transitioned from Apache-2.0 to Elastic-2.0. Commercial usage may now require paid licensing.

Recommended OSS Alternative: opensearch-project/opensearch

A community-maintained drop-in replacement operating under the Apache-2.0 license.
